codeReview.summary: The dashboard cookie migration was fully implemented in a prior commit (69877d6). All requirements were successfully met: localStorage token management was removed from use-auth.ts and api.ts, fetch wrapper uses credentials:'include', legacy tokens are cleared on load, login/register rely on cookies and do not use response body tokens, logout correctly calls POST /auth/logout, and the auth hook uses GET /auth/me with cookies.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker detected that the feature was already fully implemented in commit 69877d6 and correctly chose to verify the existing implementation rather than writing redundant code. However, the orchestrator/system assigned an already completed feature.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows worker confirming implementation and tests. handoff.skillFeedback.deviations says: 'Verified existing implementation instead of building new pages. The feature was already fully implemented in commit 69877d6 by a previous worker.'

summary: Feature was already fully implemented in a prior commit (69877d6). The worker correctly identified this, verified the existing implementation with thorough tests and browser checks, and completed the task without introducing duplicate code.
